creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
FYI, this is one of the *very* few dports-only ports (which recently broke due to change in libtool).

https://github.com/DragonFlyBSD/DPorts/tree/master/devel/libsearpc

We've had it for a while but it's unmaintained.

It's also in "devel" and not "www".

Anyway, what's the status of this?  I'd love to remove use the official version instead.
